description: jaimini baseline — Chara Karakas/Arudhas/Argala/Chara Dasha off the natal chart. --target-date pins the running Chara Dasha window (otherwise no running period is resolved at all, since neither --age nor --target-date defaults to now()).

chart_path.description: Same pinned birth chart, entered as a hand-authored pasted chart instead of ephemeris inputs, expanded via lib/chart_io.py --mode parashari and fed to the baseline via --chart. Byte-identical to the ephemeris-path snapshot for this script (jaimini's baseline never reads the ayanamsa block), so this fixture is the strongest of the six chart_io checks.
